ddls:
CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the director */,
  "num_movies_directed" INTEGER /* Number of movies directed by the director */,
  "director_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the director */,
  "director_birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "director_death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director (if applicable) */,
  "director_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "director_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the director */,
  "director_awards_won" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the director */,
  "director_nominations" INTEGER /* Number of nominations received by the director */,
  "director_filmography" TEXT /* List of notable films directed by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "actor_facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the actor */,
  "num_movies_acted_in" INTEGER /* Number of movies acted in by the actor */,
  "actor_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the actor */,
  "actor_birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "actor_death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the actor (if applicable) */,
  "actor_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "actor_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "actor_awards_won" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the actor */,
  "actor_nominations" INTEGER /* Number of nominations received by the actor */,
  "actor_filmography" TEXT /* List of notable films acted in by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actor" (
  "movie_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-actor relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "actor_role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the movie (e.g., actor_1, actor_2, actor_3) */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor in the movie */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Description of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "character_age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "character_role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., lead, supporting, cameo) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actor_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)
column_names: Number of Facebook likes for the director
Number of movies directed by the director
Death date of the director (if applicable)
Number of awards won by the director
Number of nominations received by the director
List of notable films directed by the director
Number of Facebook likes for the actor

Death date of the actor (if applicable)
Number of awards won by the actor
Number of nominations received by the actor
List of notable films acted in by the actor
Unique identifier for each movie-actor relationship
